markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy for Webflow's developer-focused content and integrations](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two new content hubs: Integrations (standalone) and Developer Blog (extension of main blog)](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [GrowthX to own tagging strategy and suggest related content for improved discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Shift towards more granular, clustered content with multi-dimensional tagging](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [Increased focus on brand messaging consistency and LLM citation monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

## Topics

### New Content Hub Strategy

  - [Creating two distinct content hubs on Webflow:](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
    1.  Integrations hub: Standalone folder, similar to Ramp's integration page
    2.  Developer blog: Extension of main Webflow blog
  - [Integrations hub to include:](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
      - [Lead page with all integrations](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [Tagging for marketplace apps vs. self-built integrations](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
      - [Default template for each integration (explanation, usefulness, implementation)](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Developer blog to feature:](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [Expanded cluster tags for better content identification](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [Suggestive content and nested keystone content for deeper discussions](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [New content hub under main blog, separate from dev docs](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)

### Content Tagging and Clustering

  - [GrowthX to own and propose clustering of articles using multiple tag sorts](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [No upper bound on tags per article](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Aim for suggestive "related posts" and improved content discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Tagging to grow over time as more pillars and keystone content are established](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Only existing tag is "developer"; new matrix tagging system to be implemented](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)

### Content Relationships and Updates

  - [GrowthX to suggest related articles and potential updates to existing content](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Goal: Create a more fluid and interconnected blog experience](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [When suggesting new articles, indicate which existing posts should be updated to reference the new content](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Brand Messaging and Content Review

  - [Need for better alignment on brand messaging, especially regarding Webflow as a CMS](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Product Marketing and Michael to provide guidelines on presenting Webflow consistently](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to focus on high-level strategy rather than individual content reviews](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### LLM Citation Monitoring

  - [GrowthX to help monitor LLM citations and mentions of Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Expand monitoring beyond developer persona to track Webflow as a brand for CMS in general](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Aggregate citation sources for brand marketing and community teams](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### AI Crawler Insights

  - [Significant growth in ChatGPT crawler activity on Webflow properties (10x increase in a few months)](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1433.0)
  - [Google crawler activity remains static](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Observed shift in traffic from search engine results pages to direct traffic](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide suggestions on integration page structure and content](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Develop content catalog with comprehensive tagging strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Share list of LLM monitoring prompts for review and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Schedule separate meeting for in-depth content review](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [Explore potential thought leadership article on AI crawler insights and trends](https://fathom.video/share/r5FXu1haaxi1WKMbp7vRTekPvoe1stNn?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
